code: import React from"react";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export function generatePseudoQRCode(seed){let hash=0;for(let i=0;i<seed.length;i++)hash=Math.imul(31,hash)+seed.charCodeAt(i)|0;const grid=[];for(let i=0;i<15;i++){for(let j=0;j<15;j++){if(Math.sin(hash+i*j)*10000%1>0.5)grid.push({x:i,y:j});}}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("svg",{viewBox:"0 0 17 17",className:"w-full h-full bg-white p-1 rounded",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("path",{d:"M1,1 h4 v4 h-4 z M2,2 h2 v2 h-2 z",fill:"black"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("path",{d:"M12,1 h4 v4 h-4 z M13,2 h2 v2 h-2 z",fill:"black"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("path",{d:"M1,12 h4 v4 h-4 z M2,13 h2 v2 h-2 z",fill:"black"}),grid.map((dot,idx)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("rect",{x:dot.x+1,y:dot.y+1,width:"1",height:"1",fill:"black"},idx))]});}
